name: Chorus Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.0900, stop A$7.7022, target A$9.2534 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
